# isSelected()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether the cell is selected.

## Declaration

```swift
func isSelected() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the cell is selected, otherwise [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Discussion

Subclasses should not override this method.

## Selection Handling

- **selectionFrame()**: Returns the receiver’s selection frame rectangle, which defines the position of the selection rectangle in its [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/IKImageBrowserView].
